message:
test(s3fifo): add ghost hit counter tracking test and update beads tracker

hostcall_s3_fifo_policy.rs: New test ghost_hit_counter_tracks_repeated_reentries_exactly
validates that telemetry().ghost_hits_total increments precisely on each
ghost hit across a mixed access sequence of three owners, and that ghost
hit decisions always produce AdmitFromGhost kind with Main tier.

.beads/issues.jsonl: Latest issue tracker snapshot from concurrent agents.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
